meta.title: America's DRONE FIGHTER programs shift into HIGH GEAR
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

America's Drone Fighter programs are shifting into high gear, with two production-representative test articles now in testing and making their way toward service.
